hooks.command: cd /home/user/gestion-chantier && node scripts/audit-btp.js --quick 2>&1 | grep -E '(CRITIQUE|WARNING|✅|0 critique)' | head -5 | jq -Rsc '{"systemMessage": "🔍 Audit BTP final — " + .}' 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; cd /home/user/gestion-chantier; AGENT=""; case "$f" in *Factures*|*FinancesPage*|*Paiements*) AGENT="facturation-suisse [TVA/liens]" ;; *DevisPage*) AGENT="devis-generator [montantHT source unique]" ;; *donnees.js*) AGENT="rentabilite-analyst+charges-sociales+data-integrity [marges/coefficient/liens]" ;; *Dashboard*|*KpiCard*) AGENT="dashboard-architect [KPIs/NaN]" ;; *alertes.js*) AGENT="alerts-engine [seuils BTP GE]" ;; *AgentEngine*|*Agents.js*|*useAgents*|*CentreIA*) AGENT="ia-engine-guardian [scores/recommandations]" ;; *useAuth*|*supabase*) AGENT="security-auditor+permissions-guardian [auth/rôles]" ;; *permissions*) AGENT="permissions-guardian [RBAC/rôles]" ;; *Heures*|*Planning*) AGENT="planning-chantier [heures/jours CCT-SOR]" ;; *Analyse*|*Marges*|*Statistiques*) AGENT="rentabilite-analyst [calculs marge sur CA]" ;; *Chantiers*) AGENT="rentabilite-analyst+bug-hunter [coûts/avancement/coefficient]" ;; *relances*) AGENT="relances-manager [niveaux/délais/dateEmission]" ;; *ExportPDF*|*ImportPDF*|*Rapport*) AGENT="rapport-generator [TVA/mentions légales PDF]" ;; *migrations*) AGENT="data-integrity [cascade/liens FK]" ;; *Simulateur*|*Benchmark*|*Soumission*) AGENT="simulation-analyst [projections/prix marché GE]" ;; *dateUtils*) AGENT="date-utils-cyna [jours ouvrables/fériés GE]" ;; esac; [ -n "$AGENT" ] && echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"👁️  $AGENT est actif\"}" || true; node scripts/audit-btp.js --quick 2>&1 | grep 'CRITIQUE' | head -3 | while IFS= read -r line; do echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"🔴 CRITIQUE: $line\"}"; done; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'git commit' && cd /home/user/gestion-chantier && CRITIQUES=$(node scripts/audit-btp.js --quick 2>&1 | grep -c 'CRITIQUE' || echo 0) && [ "$CRITIQUES" -gt 0 ] && echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"🔴 Audit BTP: $CRITIQUES critique(s) détecté(s) — corriger avant de committer\"}" || true
